allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; users=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(u.get\('username','?'\), u.get\('email',''\)\) for u in users]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('error','OK'\), d.get\('access_token',''\)[:80] if 'access_token' in d else d.get\('error_description',''\)\)")
